title: ActiveCampaign vs Klaviyo (2025): Which Is Better?
meta_description: Compare ActiveCampaign vs Klaviyo. See pricing, features, and which email marketing platform wins for your business.
h1: ActiveCampaign vs Klaviyo: Detailed Feature & Price Comparison
intro: ActiveCampaign and Klaviyo are two leading email marketing platforms with different strengths. ActiveCampaign excels at advanced automation and CRM capabilities, while Klaviyo specializes in e-commerce marketing with predictive analytics. Your choice depends on whether you need a full CRM solution or specialized e-commerce tools.

comparison_table.tool_a: CRM, lead scoring, site tracking, dynamic content

choose_a_if: You need a combined email, automation, and CRM platform for B2B or complex workflows
Lead scoring and advanced site tracking are critical for your business
You want access to an affiliate program with 20-30% recurring commissions
You prefer a platform established since 2003 with extensive enterprise features
choose_b_if: You run an e-commerce store on Shopify or WooCommerce
You want to start free and scale as your subscriber list grows
Predictive analytics and customer reviews are important for your strategy
You need a simpler, more beginner-friendly interface for email marketing

faq.a: It depends on your needs. ActiveCampaign is better for businesses requiring advanced automation, CRM, and lead scoring capabilities. Klaviyo is superior for e-commerce brands that need predictive analytics and specialized Shopify integrations. Both have excellent ratings, with Klaviyo slightly ahead on G2 (4.6 vs 4.5), but ActiveCampaign leads on Trustpilot.

faq.q: Which is cheaper, ActiveCampaign or Klaviyo?
faq.a: Klaviyo is cheaper for small businesses, offering a free tier up to 500 subscribers before paid plans start at $45/month. ActiveCampaign has no free tier and starts at $15/month, making it competitive for businesses ready to pay immediately. For e-commerce startups, Klaviyo's free option provides better value.

faq.q: Can I switch from Klaviyo to ActiveCampaign?
faq.a: Yes, you can migrate between platforms. Both support standard CSV exports and integrations with popular apps, making data transfer feasible. However, you may lose some automation workflows and custom segmentation during the transition, so plan the migration carefully and test thoroughly before switching.
